name: JJ Golf Studio
address: 10045 Baltimore National Pike Ste A12, Ellicott City, MD 21042
about: JJ Golf Studio offers both open bay and private room simulator experiences equipped with professional features including swing cameras, swing speed, club speed, and ball flight analysis. The open bay area allows for individual practice with driving range simulation, while the private rooms support up to six players for virtual rounds on over 300 courses worldwide. The venue also operates a premium club store specializing in Japanese brands and offers professional golf lessons from certified instructors. Pricing varies by room type and size, with open bays at $20 per hour and standard rooms at $50-$60 per hour, subject to seasonal adjustments.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional swing and ball flight analysis technology
Variety of Japanese premium golf equipment available for purchase
Private rooms accommodate groups for social golf experiences
Certified professional instruction available in multiple languages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't explicitly state club rental availability. It's recommended to bring your own clubs, though they do sell premium Japanese golf equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, so outside food and drinks likely aren't permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify time requirements for 18-hole rounds. It's recommended to call them at 410-465-9009 for timing details.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific kid-friendly features are mentioned. However, they offer private rooms that can accommodate families. Right-handed golfers only are specified.
